name: Butternut Squash Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the butternut squash in half lengthwise and scoop out and discard the seeds.
2. Place the cut side down on a lightly oiled baking sheet in a preheated 400°F oven.
3. Bake for 40 minutes or until tender.
4. Allow to cool before scooping out all the pulp.
5. While the squash is baking, heat butter in a skillet and cook onion and gingerroot over low heat, stirring frequently, until onion is softened.
6. Transfer onion mixture to food processor with squash pulp and puree.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Yield: 2 1/2 cups or 4-6 servings
